descriptionHtml:
Who We Are: At Huda Beauty, our Vision is to lead in creating a democratized beauty industry where power is given back to people to define, create, and enjoy beauty for themselves! Launched by award-winning beauty powerhouse Huda Kattan in 2013, Huda Beauty is one of the world's fastest growing beauty brands. As a company, we are fueled by purpose and not profit, this allows us to approach things differently so that we can create products, content, and a community like no other. A lot has changed since our launch in 2013, but something that will forever remain at the core of Huda Beauty is our focus on business excellence and our unwavering passion for kindness!

Summary: The Senior Director, Global Paid Media & Growth will architect and institutionalize Huda Beauty's global media ecosystem, developing the strategy, operating model, investment discipline, and capabilities required to drive measurable impact across awareness, acquisition, retention, and profitable growth. This role is both deeply strategic and highly operational, ensuring that paid media becomes a world‑class, data‑driven growth engine.

Essential Duties and Responsibilities:

Own the Global Paid Media Strategy & Investment Model

  • Define and lead a full‑funnel global paid media strategy across awareness, consideration, conversion, and retention.
  • Design the global media investment framework aligned with commercial, brand, and audience priorities.
  • Establish disciplined allocation and measurement models centered on incrementality, efficiency, and contribution margin
  • Integrate brand and performance media into a single, cohesive, scalable growth engine.

Build the Global Paid Media Operating Model

  • Stand up and lead a global paid media Center of Excellence.
  • Define central vs. market-led ownership, ensuring clarity, agility, and accountability.
  • Create governance frameworks, operating standards, and playbooks to ensure consistency and global scalability.
  • Strategically in‑house critical capabilities while optimizing external agency partnerships to accelerate growth

Install Performance Infrastructure & Financial Discipline

  • Implement advanced measurement frameworks including incrementality testing, MMM, attribution modeling, and experiment design.
  • Define and standardize global KPIs across markets (CAC, LTV, contribution margin, ROI, blended efficiency).
  • Embed real‑time and quarterly performance tracking into global commercial planning cycles.
  • Leverage AI, automation, and predictive optimization to drive smarter targeting, forecasting, and creative iteration.

Elevate Market Capability & Drive Global Alignment

  • Partner with regional and local teams to elevate paid media maturity and execution excellence.
  • Lead structured performance reviews, quarterly planning cadences, and annual strategic alignment cycles.
  • Ensure adherence to global guardrails while empowering markets with flexibility for local nuance.
  • Build a culture of accountability, transparency, and continuous improvement across global teams.

Retail Media Partnerships

  • Own senior‑level relationships with major platforms: Meta, Google, TikTok, retail media networks, and DSPs.
  • Negotiate global agreements, develop long‑term platform partnerships, and unlock beta opportunities.
  • Evaluate emerging channels using disciplined testing frameworks.

Build the Team & Lead the Transformation

  • Recruit, mentor, and scale a high‑performing global paid media organization.
  • Establish clear performance standards, decision‑making frameworks, and leadership expectations.
  • Act as a senior strategic advisor to Brand, E‑commerce, Finance, and Executive Leadership on media investment and growth strategy.

Requirements

  • 12-15+ years in paid media, performance marketing, or growth leadership within beauty, luxury, or FMCG.
  • Proven experience building or transforming a global paid media function.
  • Deep expertise across social, search, programmatic, retail media, and omnichannel full‑funnel ecosystems.
  • Strong financial and analytical acumen with hands‑on experience in incrementality testing, MMM, and investment modeling.
  • Experience operating in complex, matrixed, multinational organizations.
  • Demonstrated ability to build teams, influence markets, and drive organizational change.
  • Strategic, structured, analytical, and commercially grounded leader.

Benefits

  • Monthly "Self Love Days" - at company discretion
  • Premium Medical/Dental/Vision coverage for employee plus dependents
  • Monthly coaching sessions with our in-house Success Coach
  • Employee discounts on all Huda Beauty products
  • Quarterly product gifting

Huda Beauty is committed to building diverse and inclusive teams and upholding an equal employment workplace that is free from discrimination. We hire stellar individuals regardless of their race, color, ancestry, religion, gender identity, national origin, sexual orientation, age, marital status, medical conditions, disability, or veteran status. If you need reasonable accommodations at any point in the application or interview process, please let us know.

descriptionHtml:
We started as a boutique brokerage, built on quality, strong values, and a true people-first culture. Now, we’re ready for the next chapter with our new office capable of hosting over 100 agents.

This move marks a major milestone: taking the expertise, luxury service standards, and proven success of a high-end brokerage and scaling it to a whole new level.


Role Overview

Richmond Properties is launching and scaling a dedicated Commercial Division, and we are seeking an experienced and entrepreneurial Commercial Associate Director to lead this growth.


This role is responsible for building, leading, and driving the performance of a high-performing team focused on the sale and leasing of commercial assets, including office spaces, retail units, and mixed-use developments.


You will take full ownership of the commercial function — from team build-out and developer relationships to revenue generation and market positioning.


Key Responsibilities

Division Build & Leadership

  • Establish and scale the Commercial Division from the ground up
  • Recruit, train, and manage a team of commercial brokers/consultants
  • Set clear targets, KPIs, and performance frameworks for the team
  • Create a high-performance culture aligned with company objectives


Revenue Generation & Sales

  • Drive sales and leasing of commercial properties including offices, retail, and mixed-use assets
  • Personally contribute to revenue through key deals and strategic clients
  • Develop and execute a clear go-to-market strategy for commercial inventory
  • Identify and secure exclusive listings and mandates


Developer & Client Relationships

  • Build strong relationships with developers, landlords, and institutional clients
  • Source commercial inventory and negotiate favorable terms
  • Act as a senior point of contact for high-value clients and investors
  • Represent Richmond Properties as a market leader in commercial real estate


Market Strategy & Positioning

  • Define Richmond’s commercial offering within the Dubai market
  • Monitor market trends, pricing, and demand across key commercial sectors
  • Identify high-growth areas (e.g., business districts, retail hubs, emerging zones)
  • Position the company competitively against established commercial brokerages


Operational & Process Excellence

  • Implement structured processes for lead management, deal tracking, and reporting
  • Optimise CRM usage to support pipeline visibility and forecasting
  • Collaborate with marketing to develop targeted campaigns for commercial assets
  • Ensure compliance with all regulatory and documentation requirements


Key Requirements

  • Proven experience in commercial real estate brokerage in Dubai
  • Strong track record in selling or leasing commercial assets (offices, retail, etc.)
  • Experience building or leading a team within a brokerage environment
  • Established network of landlords, developers, and investors
  • Strong negotiation and deal-closing ability
  • Commercially driven with a hands-on, entrepreneurial mindset


Preferred Experience

  • Experience launching or scaling a commercial division or business unit
  • Leadership experience managing high-performing sales teams
  • Strong understanding of Dubai’s commercial property landscape and key districts

Summary: The Global PR Director will define, lead, and elevate Huda Beauty's global public relations strategy, shaping how the brand shows up in earned media, culture, and global storytelling moments. This leader will build brand equity, protect reputation, and drive cultural relevance through world‑class communications.

This role requires a visionary PR strategist with deep global media expertise, a robust industry network, and a proven ability to craft narratives that influence brand perception across markets.

Essential Duties and Responsibilities:

Strategic Leadership

  • Define and own the global PR strategy to strengthen brand visibility, desirability, and authority
  • Ensure PR narratives ladder seamlessly into broader brand and communication strategies across markets
  • Build global frameworks, playbooks, and processes that ensure PR excellence and consistency
  • Act as a strategic advisor to the Founder, VP Communications, and senior leadership on brand narrative and cultural storytelling

Public Relations

  • Lead and evolve the global PR function to set industry benchmarks in storytelling, influence, and thought leadership
  • Build and maintain strong relationships with global editors, key media, creators, and cultural voices
  • Lead PR for major product launches, brand milestones, founder initiatives, and purpose-driven campaigns
  • Architect global storytelling initiatives that strengthen brand values around innovation, inclusivity, and ethics
  • Represent Huda Beauty in high-level communications, including founder media preparation, interviews, messaging, and press opportunities
  • Partner with internal communications to ensure internal narratives align with external brand storytelling

Future of PR & Innovation

  • Champion modern PR formats including brand journalism, social-first storytelling, and creator‑driven earned media—not event-led experiences
  • Stay ahead of evolving media ecosystems, emerging platforms, and cultural storytelling trends
  • Integrate non-traditional and cross‑platform storytelling to maintain cultural relevance
  • Partner with digital, social, and content teams to strengthen owned media channels that support earned narratives
  • Explore emerging technologies (AI-driven insights, predictive media tools) to enhance PR strategy and narrative targeting

Crisis Management & Brand Protection

  • Develop and maintain crisis communication protocols, ensuring readiness and rapid response
  • Provide strategic counsel to leadership on sensitive issues, reputation risks, and high-stakes communications

Measurement, Reporting & Budgeting

  • Define KPIs and reporting frameworks to measure PR impact (media value, SOV, sentiment)
  • Own PR budget allocation, ensuring investments align with brand priorities
  • Use analytics and social listening insights to optimize messaging, storytelling, and PR effectiveness

Requirements

  • Bachelor's or Master's degree in Communications, Public Relations, Marketing, or related field
  • 8+ years of experience in public relations, preferably in beauty, luxury, fashion, or lifestyle
  • Proven success leading large-scale global PR campaigns
  • Deep understanding of classic and digital media landscapes
  • Established global network of editors, journalists, creators, and talent reps
  • Strong crisis communication, storytelling, and leadership skills
  • Excellent project management and cross-functional collaboration abilities
  • Multilingual and global market experience is a plus

Benefits

  • Monthly "Self Love Days" - at company discretion
  • Premium Medical/Dental/Vision coverage for employee plus dependents
  • Monthly coaching sessions with our in-house Success Coach
  • Employee discounts on all Huda Beauty products
  • Quarterly product gifting

Huda Beauty is committed to building diverse and inclusive teams and upholding an equal employment workplace that is free from discrimination. We hire stellar individuals regardless of their race, color, ancestry, religion, gender identity, national origin, sexual orientation, age, marital status, medical conditions, disability, or veteran status. If you need reasonable accommodations at any point in the application or interview process, please let us know.

companySlogan: We help brands grow their presence with Social Media, Content, Paid Ads and SEO.
descriptionHtml:
Account Director – Social, Content, Influencer & Performance

Company: Techne Agency

Location: Dubai (Managing a UK team) / Hybrid or Remote (with travel when required)

Type: Full-Time

Start Date: Q3 2026


About Techne Agency

Techne is a boutique marketing agency operating at the intersection of brand, content and performance. We specialise in social media, content production, influencer marketing, paid media and website content, delivering integrated strategies across the full customer journey.

We work with premium and luxury brands across hospitality, fashion, beauty and technology, supporting both brand-building and performance-driven marketing with a strong track record of results across the UK, UAE and Europe.

Our teams are based across London and Dubai, working with clients on both sides — European and UAE markets. This international footprint allows us to combine cultural relevance, creative execution and performance expertise across multiple markets.

As the agency continues to grow, we are building a senior leadership layer to support this expansion. We are looking for someone who can help shape the future of the business, elevate our standards and play a key role in delivering exceptional work across all clients.


The Role

We're looking for a senior operator to lead client delivery across the agency and act as the right hand to the Founder & CEO.

This is a pivotal role within Techne, offering the opportunity to take ownership of high-profile client relationships, shape the quality and direction of our work, and build a delivery function designed to scale.

This is not a traditional account management role. You will operate across multiple disciplines — combining strategic oversight, team leadership and hands-on execution to ensure consistently exceptional output. You'll manage the team, own the day-to-day, and be the person who keeps everything moving to a high standard.


Key Responsibilities

Client Leadership

  • Own senior client relationships across our European and UAE portfolio, acting as the main point of contact for strategy, performance and escalation
  • Lead communication and direction across retainers and projects, ensuring accounts are proactively managed
  • Identify and drive growth opportunities within existing accounts and support new business where relevant
  • Balance client ambition with operational feasibility — ensuring what gets sold can be delivered

Delivery & Standards

  • Take full ownership of delivery across all accounts, including the transition from new business into execution
  • Oversee social media, content production, influencer campaigns, paid performance, and website and editorial content
  • Define clear processes and pipelines to deliver each scope item to a high standard
  • Challenge output and hold a high bar for creative and strategic quality across all functions
  • Understand team strengths and gaps, and step in where needed to support or unblock delivery
  • Be comfortable getting hands-on when required to demonstrate standards or solve execution challenges

Team Leadership

  • Manage and develop the social, content, influencer and performance team across London and Dubai
  • Set clear expectations and hold the team accountable for performance and delivery
  • Provide regular visibility to the Founder & CEO on team performance, risks and priorities
  • Build a culture of ownership, pace and accountability — shifting the team from reactive execution to structured, proactive delivery

Operations & Problem Solving

  • Continuously review workflows, resourcing and delivery structures
  • Identify inefficiencies and implement practical, scalable solutions
  • Expand and improve the agency's network of vendors, tools and capabilities
  • Move the team from ad-hoc execution to structured, repeatable systems over time

Growth & New Business

  • Support the CEO and the Client Growth Manager on new business pitches through strong strategic, creative and operational input
  • Shape proposals, scopes and pricing aligned with both client ambition and delivery capability
  • Contribute ideas to improve the agency's offering, positioning and commercial structure


What We're Looking For

  • 7–10 years in a digital marketing agency environment, with at least 2–3 years at a senior account or director level
  • Strong working knowledge across social media, content, influencer marketing, paid performance and website content — you don't need to execute everything, but you need to know what good looks like
  • Proven experience owning client relationships and driving account growth, not just managing delivery
  • Experience managing and developing junior and mid-level team members
  • Commercially aware — strong understanding of scope, resourcing and how to protect margin
  • Comfortable operating in a fast-paced, lean agency — this is not a corporate role
  • Experience working with premium or luxury brands — you understand the standard these clients expect
  • Based in Dubai with UK market experience, or based in the UK with proven UAE market experience
  • Highly solutions-oriented, with a bias for action and ownership over process


A Note from the Founder

This role is central to the next stage of growth at Techne across London, Dubai and New York.

I'm looking for someone who can take ownership of client delivery, elevate standards across the team and help build a more scalable and structured way of operating — without losing the pace and quality that defines how we work.

This is not a hands-off or purely strategic role. You'll be expected to lead from the front, bring solutions and step into execution when needed. If you're looking for a highly structured corporate environment, this likely isn't the right fit. If you're motivated by ownership, pace and building something, we should speak.

Account Director – Social, Content, Influencer & PerformanceCompany: Techne AgencyLocation: Dubai (Managing a UK team) / Hybrid or Remote (with travel when required)Type: Full-TimeStart Date: Q3 2026
About Techne AgencyTechne is a boutique marketing agency operating at the intersection of brand, content and performance. We specialise in social media, content production, influencer marketing, paid media and website content, delivering integrated strategies across the full customer journey.We work with premium and luxury brands across hospitality, fashion, beauty and technology, supporting both brand-building and performance-driven marketing with a strong track record of results across the UK, UAE and Europe.Our teams are based across London and Dubai, working with clients on both sides — European and UAE markets. This international footprint allows us to combine cultural relevance, creative execution and performance expertise across multiple markets.As the agency continues to grow, we are building a senior leadership layer to support this expansion. We are looking for someone who can help shape the future of the business, elevate our standards and play a key role in delivering exceptional work across all clients.
The RoleWe're looking for a senior operator to lead client delivery across the agency and act as the right hand to the Founder & CEO.This is a pivotal role within Techne, offering the opportunity to take ownership of high-profile client relationships, shape the quality and direction of our work, and build a delivery function designed to scale.This is not a traditional account management role. You will operate across multiple disciplines — combining strategic oversight, team leadership and hands-on execution to ensure consistently exceptional output. You'll manage the team, own the day-to-day, and be the person who keeps everything moving to a high standard.
Key ResponsibilitiesClient LeadershipOwn senior client relationships across our European and UAE portfolio, acting as the main point of contact for strategy, performance and escalationLead communication and direction across retainers and projects, ensuring accounts are proactively managedIdentify and drive growth opportunities within existing accounts and support new business where relevantBalance client ambition with operational feasibility — ensuring what gets sold can be deliveredDelivery & StandardsTake full ownership of delivery across all accounts, including the transition from new business into executionOversee social media, content production, influencer campaigns, paid performance, and website and editorial contentDefine clear processes and pipelines to deliver each scope item to a high standardChallenge output and hold a high bar for creative and strategic quality across all functionsUnderstand team strengths and gaps, and step in where needed to support or unblock deliveryBe comfortable getting hands-on when required to demonstrate standards or solve execution challengesTeam LeadershipManage and develop the social, content, influencer and performance team across London and DubaiSet clear expectations and hold the team accountable for performance and deliveryProvide regular visibility to the Founder & CEO on team performance, risks and prioritiesBuild a culture of ownership, pace and accountability — shifting the team from reactive execution to structured, proactive deliveryOperations & Problem SolvingContinuously review workflows, resourcing and delivery structuresIdentify inefficiencies and implement practical, scalable solutionsExpand and improve the agency's network of vendors, tools and capabilitiesMove the team from ad-hoc execution to structured, repeatable systems over timeGrowth & New BusinessSupport the CEO and the Client Growth Manager on new business pitches through strong strategic, creative and operational inputShape proposals, scopes and pricing aligned with both client ambition and delivery capabilityContribute ideas to improve the agency's offering, positioning and commercial structure
What We're Looking For7–10 years in a digital marketing agency environment, with at least 2–3 years at a senior account or director levelStrong working knowledge across social media, content, influencer marketing, paid performance and website content — you don't need to execute everything, but you need to know what good looks likeProven experience owning client relationships and driving account growth, not just managing deliveryExperience managing and developing junior and mid-level team membersCommercially aware — strong understanding of scope, resourcing and how to protect marginComfortable operating in a fast-paced, lean agency — this is not a corporate roleExperience working with premium or luxury brands — you understand the standard these clients expectBased in Dubai with UK market experience, or based in the UK with proven UAE market experienceHighly solutions-oriented, with a bias for action and ownership over process
A Note from the FounderThis role is central to the next stage of growth at Techne across London, Dubai and New York.I'm looking for someone who can take ownership of client delivery, elevate standards across the team and help build a more scalable and structured way of operating — without losing the pace and quality that defines how we work.This is not a hands-off or purely strategic role. You'll be expected to lead from the front, bring solutions and step into execution when needed. If you're looking for a highly structured corporate environment, this likely isn't the right fit. If you're motivated by ownership, pace and building something, we should speak.
title: Account Director | Social, Content, Influencer & Performance

descriptionHtml:
About the Group

We are a diversified multinational group headquartered in Dubai, operating across multiple sectors, including investments, consumer, technology, and services. Our portfolio includes established businesses and high-growth ventures, supported by a strong commitment to responsible business practices and long-term value creation.


Role Overview

We are seeking an experienced Communications Director to lead the development and execution of the Group’s corporate communications strategy. The role will oversee external and internal communications, media relations, executive profiling, brand positioning, and crisis communications. The ideal candidate will bring sound judgement, strong stakeholder management skills, and the ability to operate in a complex multi-business environment.


Key Responsibilities

  • Develop and implement an integrated communications strategy aligned with the Group’s objectives.
  • Manage all external communications, including media relations, press materials, announcements, and corporate messaging.
  • Lead internal communications to support employee engagement, organisational culture, and group-wide initiatives.
  • Provide communications counsel to senior executives, including the CEO and Group leadership.
  • Drive executive profiling, including thought leadership, speaking engagements, and stakeholder engagement.
  • Oversee brand guidelines and ensure consistent positioning across all subsidiaries and business units.
  • Lead the development of crisis communications plans and act as the primary point for issues management.
  • Manage relationships with external agencies, media partners, and strategic service providers.
  • Monitor and assess communications performance, media coverage, and brand perception metrics.

  • Qualifications and Experience

    • Bachelor’s degree in Communications, Public Relations, Journalism, or related field.
    • Minimum of 10–15 years of experience in corporate communications, public affairs, or a related discipline.
    • Proven experience working with senior executives and managing high-level stakeholders.
    • Strong regional understanding of the GCC business landscape.
    • Experience leading communications within a diversified or multinational organisation is preferred.
    • Outstanding writing, editing, and presentation skills.
    • Ability to manage complex, sensitive, and high-pressure situations with professionalism.

  • Personal Attributes

    • Strategic thinker with strong operational capability.
    • Excellent judgment and decision-making skills.
    • Strong leadership and team management ability.
    • Able to work independently and handle confidential information with discretion.

companyDescription: Avaloq is a premium provider of front-to-back software and services for over 170 financial institutions around the world. Our clients include private banks, wealth managers and investment managers, as well as retail banks. We develop software that can be deployed flexibly through cloud-based Software as a Service (SaaS) or on-premises, and we offer Banking Operations outsourcing through our Business Process as a Service (BPaaS) model. Avaloq is a subsidiary of NEC Corporation, a global leader in the integration of IT and network technologies.
companySlogan: Leading the way in wealth management technology
descriptionHtml:
Company Description


Founded and headquartered in Switzerland, Avaloq is continuously expanding its global footprint with around 2,500 colleagues in 12 countries, and more than 170 clients in 35 countries. We are an industry-leading provider of wealth management technology and services for financial institutions around the world, including private banks and wealth managers, investment managers, as well as retail and neo banks. Our research led approach and continual innovation is powered by the passion and creativity of our colleagues.


We are always looking for talented people to join us on our mission to orchestrate the financial ecosystem and democratize access to wealth management. Avaloq offers the opportunity to work closely with some of the world’s leading financial institutions as we jointly develop and shape careers. Championing a collaborative, supportive and flexible work environment empowers our colleagues to reach their full potential.


Job Description


The Regional Sales Director / Manager is responsible for driving revenue growth, market expansion, and strategic client acquisition across the Middle East region. The role owns the end‑to‑end sales lifecycle, including pipeline development, strategic account management, complex deal structuring, and executive‑level stakeholder engagement, while working closely with delivery, product, marketing, and partner ecosystems to ensure sustainable growth and customer success


Key Responsibilities


Regional Revenue & Growth Ownership

  • Own and deliver regional sales targets, pipeline coverage, and forecast accuracy.
  • Drive new logo acquisition and expansion of existing strategic accounts across banking, wealth management, asset management, and capital markets.
  • Develop and execute country‑level and segment‑specific go‑to‑market strategies aligned with regional priorities (GCC, Levant, North Africa).


Strategic Account & CXO Engagement

  • Build and maintain C‑suite relationships (CEO, CIO, COO, Heads of Wealth, Digital, and Transformation).
  • Lead complex, multi‑stakeholder sales cycles, including RFPs, negotiations, and commercial structuring.
  • Act as a trusted advisor to clients on business transformation, platform modernization, and regulatory change.


Sales Execution & Deal Leadership

  • Lead the full sales lifecycle: opportunity qualification, solution positioning, pricing, contracting, and closure.
  • Partner with pre‑sales, solution architects, and delivery teams to shape winning proposals and value‑based business cases.
  • Ensure governance, compliance, and internal approval processes are followed for all deals.


Partner & Ecosystem Development

  • Build and manage a strong regional partner ecosystem (system integrators, advisory firms, technology partners, introducers).
  • Identify and execute co‑sell and joint go‑to‑market initiatives with strategic partners.
  • Strengthen regional market credibility through alliances and industry presence.


Market Intelligence & Competitive Positioning

  • Track market trends, regulatory changes, and competitive dynamics in the Middle East.
  • Provide structured feedback into product, pricing, and regional solution strategies.
  • Position differentiated value propositions against global and regional competitors.


Team Leadership & Collaboration

  • Lead, coach, and develop regional sales and account management teams (where applicable).
  • Foster strong collaboration with marketing, delivery, governance, and operations teams to ensure seamless execution.
  • Contribute to regional leadership forums and management committees.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

  • Regional revenue achievement and pipeline coverage
  • New logo wins and strategic account expansion
  • Forecast accuracy and deal governance compliance
  • Average deal size and margin quality
  • Partner‑sourced revenue contribution
  • Client satisfaction and long‑term account sustainability


Qualifications


  • Experience: Minimum of 15 years of proven sales experience in the banking, wealth management, or financial technology (fintech) industry, with a track record of exceeding sales targets, especially in the Middle Eastern region.
  • Industry Knowledge: Strong understanding of the banking, wealth management, and financial services landscape, including regulations, technology trends, and challenges faced by financial institutions.
  • Sales Skills: Demonstrated ability to sell complex software solutions to senior executives, with expertise in consultative and solution-based selling methodologies.
  • Communication: Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to present complex concepts in a clear, concise, and persuasive manner.
  • Relationship Management: Proven ability to build, nurture, and maintain strong client relationships, with a customer-centric approach to sales.
  • Leadership: Ability to work independently and collaborate with a team, manage multiple opportunities simultaneously, and mentor junior team members.
  • Education: Minimum Bachelor’s degree in Business, Finance, or a related field. MBA or relevant certifications in sales or financial services is a plus.
  • Technical Proficiency: Comfortable using CRM tools (Salesforce, HubSpot, etc.), Microsoft Office Suite, and other sales and presentation tools. Familiarity with banking and wealth management software is advantageous.
  • Education: Proficiency in English. French & Arabic language would be an added advantage.


Additional information


We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices.


In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self.


We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way.


Please be aware that we will not accept speculative CV submissions for any of our roles from recruitment agencies, and any unsolicited candidate submissions will be exempt from any payment expectations.

descriptionHtml:
We're looking for a Business Development Director – Azure/Data/AI to join our team in Dubai, United Arab Emirates in a hybrid working mode.

In this role, you will own business growth by driving Microsoft Azure–related opportunities across the region. You will focus on hunting for new clients, expanding our Microsoft ecosystem presence, and influencing stakeholders to deliver joint success. The position offers an opportunity to make a measurable impact on EPAM’s cloud strategy in the UAE, working closely with industry leaders to shape cloud adoption and digital transformation across public and private sectors.

 

Responsibilities

  • Drive new business acquisition and revenue growth within Microsoft Azure and related data & AI services
  • Hunt for opportunities in both new and existing accounts through proactive business development
  • Build, develop and leverage strong relationships within Microsoft and across their partner ecosystem to generate joint opportunities
  • Coordinate account strategies with EPAM and Microsoft sales teams, solution consultants and delivery leads to craft compelling propositions
  • Oversee the creation of proposals, RFPs/RFQs/RFIs and sales plans in collaboration with pre-sales, legal and delivery teams
  • Lead joint marketing initiatives with Microsoft and internal marketing teams to support demand generation
  • Act as the internal subject matter advisor on Microsoft Azure, ensuring EPAM’s teams access early release programs and product roadmaps
  • Advocate EPAM’s capabilities within the Microsoft network, increasing partner-based lead referrals
  • Organize and deliver product messaging, enablement sessions and high-level solution presentations to clients
  • Maintain accurate pipeline and forecast management in alignment with internal reporting requirements

Requirements

  • 7–12 years of experience in IT sales with demonstrated success in new business development
  • Proven track record of hunting for net-new accounts and expanding business in existing accounts
  • Strong knowledge of Microsoft Azure ecosystem and ability to navigate partnerships effectively
  • Established network within UAE public sector clients and deep familiarity with the local IT market
  • Bachelor’s degree in business, marketing or equivalent education
  • Expertise in solution selling and multi-stakeholder deal orchestration
  • Exceptional communication, presentation and negotiation skills in both English and Arabic
  • Ability to work independently while collaborating across distributed teams
  • Experience managing the full sales cycle, including legal and commercial negotiations

Nice to have

  • Previous experience working for or partnering closely with Microsoft
  • Familiarity with cloud transformation programs and enterprise consulting engagements

 

We offer

  • End of service gratuity
  • Private healthcare and life insurance
  • Employee assistance program
  • Wellness program
  • Annual air travel allowance for expatriates
  • Regular performance feedback and salary reviews
  • Global travel medical and accident insurance
  • Referral bonuses
  • Learning and development opportunities including in-house training and coaching, professional certifications, and courses

descriptionHtml:
Job Overview

We are seeking an experienced and commercially driven Client Director with 8-12 years of experience in digital marketing and client leadership.

The ideal candidate has a strong track record in leading pitches, winning RFPs, managing a portfolio of clients, and driving revenue growth through strategic account expansion.

This role requires a senior leader who can combine strategic thinking, commercial ownership, and full-funnel digital expertise to grow both new and existing business.

Key Responsibilities

  • Lead and manage end-to-end pitching and RFP processes
  • Develop winning proposals, strategic decks, and commercial frameworks
  • Own and deliver against assigned revenue targets
  • Drive new business acquisition and pipeline growth
  • Manage and grow a portfolio of key client accounts
  • Identify and execute upselling and cross-selling opportunities
  • Develop integrated full-funnel digital strategies (awareness, consideration, conversion, retention)
  • Build strong, long-term client partnerships at senior stakeholder level
  • Collaborate with internal teams (performance, media, creative, content, analytics) to ensure delivery excellence
  • Monitor account performance and ensure client satisfaction, retention, and profitability

Requirements

Requirements

  • 8-12 years of experience in client servicing, account leadership, or business development within digital marketing
  • Proven track record of winning competitive RFPs and leading successful pitches
  • Strong commercial acumen with experience owning revenue targets
  • Demonstrated ability to drive account growth through upselling and cross-selling
  • Deep understanding of full-funnel digital marketing strategy
  • Experience managing multiple clients and cross-functional teams
  • Excellent presentation, negotiation, and stakeholder management skills
  • Results-driven mindset with strong leadership capabilities

Preferred Background

  • Agency experience preferred
  • Experience handling large or regional accounts
  • Strong analytical and performance-driven approach

descriptionHtml:
About The Opportunity

We are looking for an experienced Aesthetic Technician / Practitioner to lead and run a premium beauty and aesthetics clinic in Dubai. This is a unique opportunity to build and operate your own practice, fully supported with investment, infrastructure, and operational setup, with a profit-share arrangement starting after 12 months.

Key Responsibilities

Run the clinic end-to-end, including clinical, operational, and business management

Deliver advanced aesthetic treatments at the highest standard

Supervise and mentor staff as the clinic grows

Shape the clinic's service offerings and build a loyal client base

Ensure full compliance with Dubai health authority regulations

Core Treatments

Botox, dermal fillers, LED light therapy, laser treatments, RF/HIFU skin tightening, medical-grade facials, HydraFacial, chemical peels, microneedling, PRP/skin boosters, acne and pigmentation treatments, anti-ageing treatments, and general skin rejuvenation

Requirements

Requirements

Proven experience running a beauty or aesthetics clinic end-to-end

Fully qualified and certified aesthetic practitioner

DHA / UAE-compliant certifications

Strong clinical and business management skills

Commercial mindset and client-focused approach

Package & Opportunity

Full investment in clinic setup, equipment, and operations

Infrastructure and operational support provided

Profit-share opportunity starting after year one

Long-term potential to grow your own brand and multiple locations

Location:

Dubai, UAE

companySlogan: Leading the way in wealth management technology
descriptionHtml:
Company Description


Founded and headquartered in Switzerland, Avaloq is continuously expanding its global footprint with around 2,500 colleagues in 12 countries, and more than 170 clients in 35 countries. We are an industry-leading provider of wealth management technology and services for financial institutions around the world, including private banks and wealth managers, investment managers, as well as retail and neo banks. Our research led approach and continual innovation is powered by the passion and creativity of our colleagues.


We are always looking for talented people to join us on our mission to orchestrate the financial ecosystem and democratize access to wealth management. Avaloq offers the opportunity to work closely with some of the world’s leading financial institutions as we jointly develop and shape careers. Championing a collaborative, supportive and flexible work environment empowers our colleagues to reach their full potential.


Job Description


The Regional Sales Director / Manager – Middle East is responsible for driving revenue growth, market expansion, and strategic client acquisition across the Middle East region. The role owns the end‑to‑end sales lifecycle, including pipeline development, strategic account management, complex deal structuring, and executive‑level stakeholder engagement, while working closely with delivery, product, marketing, and partner ecosystems to ensure sustainable growth and customer success.


Key Responsibilities:


Regional Revenue & Growth Ownership

  • Own and deliver regional sales targets, pipeline coverage, and forecast accuracy.
  • Drive new logo acquisition and expansion of existing strategic accounts across banking, wealth management, asset management, and capital markets.
  • Develop and execute country‑level and segment‑specific go‑to‑market strategies aligned with regional priorities (GCC, Levant, North Africa).


Strategic Account & CXO Engagement

  • Build and maintain C‑suite relationships (CEO, CIO, COO, Heads of Wealth, Digital, and Transformation).
  • Lead complex, multi‑stakeholder sales cycles, including RFPs, negotiations, and commercial structuring.
  • Act as a trusted advisor to clients on business transformation, platform modernization, and regulatory change.


Sales Execution & Deal Leadership

  • Lead the full sales lifecycle: opportunity qualification, solution positioning, pricing, contracting, and closure.
  • Partner with pre‑sales, solution architects, and delivery teams to shape winning proposals and value‑based business cases.
  • Ensure governance, compliance, and internal approval processes are followed for all deals.


Partner & Ecosystem Development

  • Build and manage a strong regional partner ecosystem (system integrators, advisory firms, technology partners, introducers).
  • Identify and execute co‑sell and joint go‑to‑market initiatives with strategic partners.
  • Strengthen regional market credibility through alliances and industry presence.


Market Intelligence & Competitive Positioning

  • Track market trends, regulatory changes, and competitive dynamics in the Middle East.
  • Provide structured feedback into product, pricing, and regional solution strategies.
  • Position differentiated value propositions against global and regional competitors.


Team Leadership & Collaboration

  • Lead, coach, and develop regional sales and account management teams (where applicable).
  • Foster strong collaboration with marketing, delivery, governance, and operations teams to ensure seamless execution.
  • Contribute to regional leadership forums and management committees.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

  • Regional revenue achievement and pipeline coverage
  • New logo wins and strategic account expansion
  • Forecast accuracy and deal governance compliance
  • Average deal size and margin quality
  • Partner‑sourced revenue contribution
  • Client satisfaction and long‑term account sustainability


Qualifications:


  • Experience: Minimum of 15 years of proven sales experience in the banking, wealth management, or financial technology (fintech) industry, with a track record of exceeding sales targets, especially in the Middle Eastern region.
  • Industry Knowledge: Strong understanding of the banking, wealth management, and financial services landscape, including regulations, technology trends, and challenges faced by financial institutions.
  • Sales Skills: Demonstrated ability to sell complex software solutions to senior executives, with expertise in consultative and solution-based selling methodologies.
  • Communication: Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to present complex concepts in a clear, concise, and persuasive manner.
  • Relationship Management: Proven ability to build, nurture, and maintain strong client relationships, with a customer-centric approach to sales.
  • Leadership: Ability to work independently and collaborate with a team, manage multiple opportunities simultaneously, and mentor junior team members.
  • Education: Minimum Bachelor’s degree in Business, Finance, or a related field. MBA or relevant certifications in sales or financial services is a plus.
  • Technical Proficiency: Comfortable using CRM tools (Salesforce, HubSpot, etc.), Microsoft Office Suite, and other sales and presentation tools. Familiarity with banking and wealth management software is advantageous.
  • Education: Proficiency in English. Arabic & French language would be an added advantage.


Additional Information

We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices.


In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self.


We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way.


Please be aware that we will not accept speculative CV submissions for any of our roles from recruitment agencies, and any unsolicited candidate submissions will be exempt from any payment expectations.

descriptionHtml:
About Richmond Properties

Richmond Properties is entering a high-growth expansion phase, moving into larger premises and significantly increasing the number of real estate consultants across the business. As part of this growth, we are strengthening our Off Plan division and seeking an experienced

Associate Sales Director – Off Plan to help scale this department into a market-leading operation.


Role Overview

This role is responsible for driving revenue across our Off Plan portfolio while building and managing a high-performing team of consultants. Working closely with the senior leadership team, you will design and execute the off-plan sales strategy, develop talent, and establish systems that support sustainable, scalable growth


Key Responsibilities

Off Plan Sales Strategy & Revenue

  • Lead the overall off-plan sales strategy in alignment with company growth objectives
  • Build and manage strong relationships with key developers and project partners
  • Drive revenue through strategic deal structuring, pricing strategies, and pipeline management
  • Analyse performance metrics and continuously optimise conversion and sales velocity

Team Leadership & Development

  • Recruit, onboard, and develop a high-performing off-plan sales team
  • Coach consultants on deal structuring, negotiation, and developer relations
  • Implement KPIs, performance frameworks, and commission structures
  • Build a culture of accountability, professionalism, and high performance

Operational & Cross-Functional Leadership

  • Work closely with Marketing to align campaigns with off-plan project launches
  • Collaborate with Training & Development to ensure consultants are market-ready
  • Maintain compliance with RERA, developer requirements, and brokerage standards
  • Support forecasting, budgeting, and growth planning for the off-plan division


Requirements

  • Minimum 5+ years’ experience in Dubai off-plan real estate sales
  • Proven track record of leading high-performing off-plan teams
  • Strong developer network and market knowledge
  • Demonstrated ability to scale teams and build sales structures
  • Strategic, commercially minded, and highly organised
  • Strong leadership, coaching, and negotiation skills


What We Offer

  • Leadership role in a rapidly scaling brokerage
  • Highly competitive package with uncapped earning potential
  • Significant autonomy to build and shape the Off Plan division
  • Clear progression as the company grows
  • Supportive leadership team and ambitious company cuture.

companyDescription:
Anton Oilfield Services Group (hereinafter as “Anton”)  is the world's leading integrated oilfield technology service company that provides clients with a full range of products and services for oil and gas development, with business throughout the world's major oil and gas production areas. Anton is an innovative company combined with the geological engineering and features production increase, cost reduction and integration.
Anton is committed to the in-depth development of global oil and gas development in emerging markets. Its business covers more than 30 countries and regions, including China, the Middle East, Africa, central Asia, southeast Asia and Latin America, forming a rapidly responsive global service support system.
Anton provides a full range of products and services in the oil and gas development process to meet the diverse needs of clients and help them maximize the value of oil and gas assets. Anton's comprehensive products and services include: products and services for the whole process of oil and gas development, a full range of professional resource services for oil and gas development, and integrated services in various forms.
Anton's corporate culture is rooted in the traditional oriental culture. Anton's core values are Client-centric, Hard working, Learning and innovation. Anton's mission is to help others succeed, share fruits with employees internally and achieve win-win development with partners externally.
Anton's vision is to be a model for the harmony and high-efficiency development between man and environment. In every construction work scene, Anton is committed to achieving the standard of "operation first" and creating value for clients to the maximum extent. In the process of development, Anton does the best to promote social progress and achieve harmonious development with the society.
descriptionHtml:
About Anton

Anton Oilfield Services Group is a globally leading independent integrated oilfield technology services company, operating across major oil and gas production regions worldwide. The business covers oilfield technical services, oilfield management services, oil and gas development operations, natural gas utilization, AI-enabled solutions, and platform collaboration. Anton Group employs approximately 7,000 staff from over 30 countries and regions. Anton’s long-term goal is to become a world-leading green energy technical services company, growing together with its clients and talent to promote high-quality development in the energy industry.


About the Role

Job Title: Sales Director

Job Location: Dubai/Middleeast


Responsibilities

  • Develop annual/quarterly sales targets and plans; analyze markets and competitors; report sales performance and strategic progress.
  • Recruit and manage the sales team; conduct systematic training; set KPIs and oversee daily supervision, evaluation, and performance improvement.
  • Manage the full sales cycle-lead generation, negotiations, contract signing, and payment follow-up; participate in key deals; expand new markets; maintain relationships with major clients and partners.


Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree or above in Marketing, Business Administration, Economics, Engineering, or a related field; a Master’s degree is a plus.
  • 10+ years of sales and business development experience in the energy sector, including at least 5 years in a senior leadership role (Director / Deputy Director level) within oil & gas operations & maintenance (O&M), energy services, or EPC/EPCM-related businesses.
  • Proven track record in developing and securing O&M contracts for oil & gas fields, production facilities, pipelines, utilities, or energy infrastructure projects.
  • Strong and well-established relationships with: Iraqi government authorities and regulatory bodies (e.g., Ministry of Oil and related entities), Local Iraqi oil & gas companies and service providers, International oil companies (IOCs) and international contractors with operations or branches in Iraq.
  • Deep understanding of the Iraqi oil & gas market, including local business practices, contracting models, tendering processes, and compliance requirements related to O&M services.
  • Demonstrated ability to lead and build high-performing sales and BD teams, define market strategies, and drive sustainable revenue growth in project-based and long-cycle O&M environments.
  • Strong commercial acumen, with experience in bid strategy, contract negotiation, pricing, risk assessment, and client relationship management for long-term service contracts.
  • Fluent in Arabic and English, with excellent communication and negotiation skills for engagement with government stakeholders, local partners, and international clients.
  • Results-oriented, highly resilient, and capable of operating effectively in complex, high-pressure, and multicultural environments, including frequent travel within Iraq and the region.

companyDescription:
Innovative Fast-Track Solutions… Leading the Industry with Excellence!

ALBADDAD is a global leader in fast-track building solutions.

Established in 1971, ALBADDAD has evolved from a local brand to an international powerhouse, setting benchmarks in production capacity, record time delivery, state-of-the-art technology, and pioneering products.

With headquarters in the UAE and KSA, spanning over 1.5 million square meters, ALBADDAD is supported by more than 7,000 employees across the GCC region. Today, ALBADDAD operates in over 50 markets across the Middle East, Africa, Asia, Europe, and the United States.

Proud holders of three Guinness World Records, achieved in 2016, 2023, and 2024, for constructing the world’s largest marquees in Mecca, covering 1.5 million square meters within a single year.

ALBADDAD offers a comprehensive range of temporary, semi-permanent, and permanent structures. Sustainability is a cornerstone of the business, demonstrated by innovative recycling programs, which divert 30% of waste from landfills and contribute to carbon certification achievements.
descriptionHtml:
Marketing Communication Director

Position Summary

The Marketing Communication Director is responsible for developing and executing strategic communication and marketing initiatives that enhance brand awareness, drive audience engagement, and support organizational goals. This role oversees messaging, content strategy, brand management, public relations, and multi-channel communication efforts. The Director manages cross-functional teams and ensures consistency and quality across all touchpoints.

Key Responsibilities

Strategic Leadership

·       Develop and implement an integrated marketing and communications strategy aligned with the organization’s mission and business objectives.

·       Lead brand positioning, messaging frameworks, and communication guidelines.

·       Analyze market trends, audience insights, and competitive landscapes to inform strategy.

Marketing & Campaign Management

·       Plan and oversee multi-channel marketing campaigns (digital, social, print, email, events).

·       Manage marketing calendars, performance metrics, and budget allocation.

·       Ensure campaigns achieve measurable KPIs, such as lead generation, engagement, and conversion.

Content & Creative Oversight

·       Direct the creation of compelling content across platforms—web, social media, advertising, collateral, reports, and presentations.

·       Supervise internal and external creative teams (writers, designers, agencies).

·       Maintain consistent tone, voice, and visual identity across all communications.

Public Relations & Media Relations

·       Build and maintain relationships with media outlets, journalists, and influencers.

·       Oversee press releases, media statements, crisis communication, and storytelling initiatives.

·       Serve as a spokesperson or prepare executives for media engagements.

Digital Strategy & Analytics

·       Lead the organization’s digital presence, including website strategy, SEO/SEM, and social media channels.

·       Monitor analytics dashboards and optimize content and campaigns for ROI.

·       Ensure alignment with the latest digital trends and technologies.

Team Leadership

·       Manage, mentor, and develop a high-performing marketing and communication team.

·       Foster collaboration with sales, product, HR, and executive leadership.

·       Oversee vendor and agency relationships.

Qualifications

·       Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, Public Relations, or a related field (Master’s preferred).

·       8–12+ years of experience in marketing and communications, including leadership responsibilities.

·       Proven experience developing and executing integrated marketing strategies.

·       Strong writing, storytelling, and editing skills.

·       Expertise in digital marketing, analytics tools, and content management systems.

·       Exceptional project management and organizational skills.

·       Ability to work under pressure, manage multiple priorities, and meet deadlines.

Key Competencies

·       Strategic thinking and creative vision

·       Strong leadership and team-building skills

·       Excellent verbal and written communication

·       Analytical decision-making

·       Brand and reputation management

·       Collaboration and stakeholder management

Working Conditions

·       Full-time, on-site role

·       May require occasional travel for events, conferences, or media engagements.

companyDescription:
Experts Group International (formerly Connecting Experts) is a global recruitment agency with a mission to connect specialist talent across Europe, the Middle East, Asia, and North America. Our goal is to become a global leader in the Technology, CleanTech, and Value Chain industries through our bespoke talent solutions. Over the past nine years, we've built our business around market-specific experts across the EU, the Middle East, Asia, and North America - allowing us to respond faster and more effectively than our competitors and deliver the most highly sought-after candidates within our niche sectors.

Where we Operate

We partner with businesses shaping a safer, cleaner, and more connected world across key global regions—including DACH, the Benelux, Broader Europe, Asia, and North America. With a deep belief in the power of innovation, we specialise in delivering niche, high-impact talent solutions across the Technology, Value Chain, and CleanTech sectors. Our network, built on trust, expertise, and speed, enables us to connect world-changing companies with the experts who drive them forward.

Our Values
At the heart of everything we do is a commitment to creating meaningful impact - for our partners, our candidates, and the world. We work with businesses that are shaping a safer, cleaner, and more connected future, driven by the belief that innovation thrives when the right people are in the right places. Specialising in niche, high-impact talent solutions across Technology, Value Chain, and CleanTech sectors, we are relentless in our pursuit of value, integrity, and long-term success for every relationship we build. We connect experts with purpose.

descriptionHtml:
Human Resources Director

Location: Dubai, United Arab Emirates


Role Overview:

We are seeking an experienced Human Resources Director to lead the HR function for a growing construction business based in Dubai. This role will focus heavily on talent acquisition, workforce planning, compensation and benefits strategy, and building scalable HR frameworks to support project-based operations across the UAE and wider region.

The HR Director will act as a strategic partner to executive leadership, ensuring the organisation attracts, develops, and retains top-tier talent while maintaining compliance with UAE labour laws and industry regulations.


Key Responsibilities

1. Talent Acquisition & Workforce Planning

  • Develop and implement a comprehensive talent acquisition strategy aligned with business growth and project pipeline demands.
  • Lead high-volume recruitment across technical, engineering, project management, and corporate functions.
  • Build strong talent pipelines for critical construction roles (e.g., project directors, engineers, quantity surveyors, site managers).
  • Establish employer branding initiatives to position the company as an employer of choice within the construction sector.
  • Oversee recruitment partners, agencies, and international hiring campaigns where required.
  • Implement workforce planning models to ensure manpower forecasting aligns with project timelines.

2. Compensation & Benefits

  • Design and implement competitive compensation and benefits frameworks aligned with market benchmarks in the UAE construction industry.
  • Lead salary benchmarking exercises and ensure internal equity across roles and geographies.
  • Develop incentive schemes linked to project performance and business outcomes.
  • Oversee benefits administration including health insurance, allowances, bonuses, and expatriate packages.
  • Ensure compliance with WPS (Wage Protection System) and UAE Labour Law requirements.

3. HR Strategy & Leadership

  • Develop and execute the overall HR strategy in alignment with business objectives.
  • Establish HR policies, procedures, and governance frameworks suitable for a project-driven environment.
  • Lead organisational design initiatives to support business expansion.
  • Provide strategic counsel to senior leadership on people-related matters.

4. Employee Relations & Compliance

  • Ensure full compliance with UAE Labour Law and regulatory requirements.
  • Oversee employee relations matters including disciplinary processes and conflict resolution.
  • Develop retention and engagement strategies to reduce turnover across site-based and corporate employees.

5. Performance Management & Development

  • Implement performance management frameworks aligned with KPIs and project milestones.
  • Support leadership development and succession planning initiatives.
  • Promote a culture of accountability, safety, and high performance.


Candidate Profile

  • Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related field (Master’s degree preferred).
  • 12+ years of progressive HR experience, with at least 5 years in a senior leadership role within construction, engineering, or infrastructure sectors.
  • Strong expertise in talent acquisition within project-based environments.
  • Proven experience designing compensation and benefits frameworks in the UAE market.
  • In-depth knowledge of UAE Labour Law and HR compliance requirements.
  • Experience managing multi-site or geographically dispersed workforces.
  • Strong leadership, stakeholder management, and influencing skills.
  • Professional HR certification (CIPD, SHRM, or equivalent) preferred.

companyDescription:
Located in the heart of each destination we call home, a stay at any Fairmont hotel is truly unforgettable. Known for grand and awe-inspiring properties and thoughtful and engaging colleagues who aim to make each and every stay a cherished and memorable experience, we have been the stage for some of the most significant moments in global history. 

As a part of ALL - the Accor Live Limitless Lifestyle Loyalty Program, with 90 exceptional addresses in 32 countries, we are as favored by world leaders and business travelers as we are by families and those with a penchant for luxurious travels. 

Fairmont Hotels stand at the intersection of elegance and culture, where significant occasions are honored and pivotal global events unfold. Wherever we are situated, our hotels become the cultural and social heart of the community; so immersed in local traditions and so deeply connected to our surroundings, Fairmont Hotels are seen as an essential part of their respective destinations.
descriptionHtml:
Company Description

Fairmont The Palm is a luxury, world-class resort located on the iconic Palm Jumeirah Island in Dubai. The hotel features 391 guest rooms and suites with dedicated Fairmont Gold rooms and lounge. A total of 11 food and beverage outlets on property offer international dining options including Michelin Guide recommended 2022 and 2023 Little Miss India, Frevo - Brazilian Churrasco experience, Seagrill Bistro, Ba Restaurant and Lounge, Blowfish, Flow Kitchen, The Cigar Room, Vuvuzela and others. Fairmont The Palm also features an expansive pool and beach area with a health club, Serenity Spa Dubai - The Art Of Well Being and the Fairmont Falcons Kids’ Club.

Job Description

Reporting to the General Manager, responsibilities and essential job functions include but are not limited to the following:

  • Manage all activity within the marketing and public relations department, ensuring all brand standards are followed.
  • Serve as the hotel’s primary brand ambassador, ensuring that brand guidelines are followed.
  • Develop the hotel’s communication strategies and execute the marketing, public relations and marketing campaigns in conjunction with the Sales, Spa, Food and Beverage departments to ensure profit growth and brand exposure.
  • This includes but is not limited to the following:
  • Hotel photography
  • Creative direction for advertisements
  • PR pitch calendars and tactical activities
  • Development and dissemination of media releases/minimum 2 per month
  • Guest and sales collateral pieces
  • Build brand partnerships and generate consumer event activations at the property level.
  • Research, analyze and monitor financial, technological and demographic factors so that market opportunities may be capitalized on.
  • Plan and oversee the hotel’s advertising and promotional activities, including print, electronic, radio, social and direct mail.
  • Develop promotional materials, which including printed collaterals
  • Provide key messaging support for media interviews and for reputation management issues i.e. crisis communications.
  • Develop and deliver insightful strategies and presentations to the executive committee and business departments where appropriate.
  • Update and regularly review all hotels’ restaurant and spa listings in both print and electronic media.
  • Work with digital marketing to develop compelling consumer and media content.

Qualifications

  • Minimum 5-8 years of progressive experience in marketing and communications, ideally within luxury hospitality environments at Director of MArketing and Communicatoin level.
  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English
  • Demonstrated capability to manage multiple concurrent projects with meticulous attention to detail
  • Strong leadership credentials with proven ability to inspire teams and manage stakeholder relationships across multiple properties
  • Ability to remain composed and perform effectively under pressure in dynamic, fast-paced settings
  • Bachelor's degree or equivalent professional qualification
  • In-depth knowledge of the UAE media landscape and established media relationships (preferred)
  • Background working with marketing and PR agencies (preferred)

companyDescription:
Madison Pearl (MP) is the search firm of choice amongst the leading financial services firms and legal firms for mid to senior level positions including C-suite searches. 

Founded in 2015, we are a truly Global Executive Search Firm strategically based out of DIFC, UAE to focus on mid-senior level positions including C suite in the rapidly evolving regional financial markets; as well as developed markets such as US and Europe. We also have an office in Bahrain as an extension to our commitment to the region and to be close to our clients in Saudi Arabia & Kuwait. From our office in Dublin we cater to our clients in US and Europe. We service our APAC clients from our Hong Kong office. We also recently opened our first UK office in London.

Encompassing a wide umbrella of services including Contingent and Retained searches aswell as Market Intelligence, Compensation Benchmarking, Board Advisory and Leadership Consulting, we provide 360 degree customized solutions for our client’s Talent Acquisition, Succession Planning and Employee Retention needs.

We work in teams where knowledge is shared and the client solution discussed thoroughly from every angle. Our sector specialist consultants are passionate about providing comprehensive yet timely recruitment solutions to our clients ranging from a single key hire to an entire team build up, leveraging their solid knowledge and relationships in vertical markets.

Driving support from our dedicated in-house research team that meticulously devises a step by step search strategy to identify and attract talent pool via sourcing from our robust internal database coupled with head-hunting techniques. 

Exhibiting an unrivalled track record in successfully placing and mobilizing world class talent from leading financial & banking firms from Developed, Emerging, Frontier &rapidly developing markets, our reputation for delivery is exemplary which has earned us the confidence of our clients’ as the most trusted go to search partner.

descriptionHtml:
Confidential Mandate | Exclusive Search by Madison Pearl


Madison Pearl is partnering on a confidential search for a senior leadership appointment within a prominent and rapidly evolving exhibitions and events platform in the UAE. This role sits at the forefront of the organisation’s growth agenda and will be responsible for shaping the strategic direction of a large scale exhibitions portfolio. The successful candidate will lead the commercial, operational, and stakeholder framework required to position the platform as a leading regional destination for business events, conferences, and international exhibitions. Working closely with executive leadership and key external partners, this individual will be instrumental in driving market expansion, enhancing venue utilisation, and strengthening the organisation’s long term presence across the regional and international MICE landscape.


Key Responsibilities:


  • Lead the strategic direction and performance of the exhibitions business unit
  • Drive revenue growth across event sales, sponsorship, partnerships, and venue utilisation
  • Oversee the planning and delivery of major exhibitions, conferences, and corporate events
  • Build and manage relationships with key stakeholders across government, industry, and international partners
  • Identify new market opportunities and support the launch of new event concepts and portfolios
  • Lead and develop commercial, operations, and event management teams
  • Support the wider positioning of the organisation as a leading regional destination for business events


Candidate Profile:


We are keen to speak with senior professionals currently operating at General Manager, Director, Managing Director, or senior business leadership level within:

  • exhibition centres
  • convention venues
  • major event organisers
  • MICE platforms
  • destination and tourism entities
  • venue management groups


If you are interested in discussing this mandate, please contact Daniel Brocklebank on daniel.brocklebank@madisonpearl.com



*Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted*

companyDescription:
Ivanti is a global enterprise IT and security software company dedicated to unlocking human potential by managing, automating and protecting data and systems to empower continuous innovation. With adaptable software solutions tailored to customer needs, Ivanti empowers IT and security teams to enhance operational efficiency, cut costs and proactively mitigate security risks. 

At the heart of Ivanti’s offerings is the AI-powered Ivanti Neurons platform, which transforms the way IT and security teams operate. By delivering unified, reusable services and tools, the platform ensures consistent visibility, scalability, and secure solution implementation, enabling teams to work smarter, not harder. Ivanti follows “Secure by Design” principles to provide software solutions that scale with our customers’ needs to help enable IT and Security to improve operational efficiency while reducing costs and proactively reducing risk. 

Ivanti fosters an inclusive environment where diverse perspectives are honored and valued, reflecting a commitment to a sustainable future for customers, partners, employees and the planet.

descriptionHtml:
The Director of Influencer & Brand Partnerships is responsible for leading the strategic vision, growth, and performance of Ego & East’s Talent Management division. This role oversees the management and development of a roster of talents, including high-profile and celebrity figures, while driving innovative brand partnerships that strengthen the agency’s market positioning and revenue growth.

This position requires a forward-thinking leader who combines strategic planning with hands-on execution, ensuring that all talent and brand initiatives align with long-term business goals. The Director will manage a growing team, build and nurture key client relationships, and oversee negotiations and partnership activations across the MENA region and beyond.

The ideal candidate will bring a deep understanding of influencer marketing, brand strategy, and the luxury and lifestyle landscape, with proven experience in driving large-scale partnerships and managing high-performing teams.


JOB DUTIES & RESPONSIBILITIES


Business Development & Growth

  • Own and drive the commercial growth of the Talent & Partnerships division, with clear accountability for revenue targets and overall performance.
  • Identify, develop, and secure high-value brand partnerships, collaborations, and new business opportunities across regional and international markets.
  • Leverage an established network of brands, agencies, and decision-makers to generate leads and convert them into long-term partnerships.
  • Lead the development of strategic proposals, RFP responses, and partnership frameworks, ensuring innovative and competitive positioning.
  • Continuously identify new revenue streams, market opportunities, and expansion areas to scale the division sustainably.


Influencer / Talent Strategy & Relationship Management

  • Define and lead the long-term vision and positioning of the talent roster, ensuring alignment with market trends and business objectives.
  • Oversee the management and development of high-profile and emerging talent, driving growth, visibility, and commercial success.
  • Build and maintain strong, trusted relationships with talents, acting as a senior advisor on career strategy, partnerships, and brand positioning.
  • Identify, attract, and sign top-tier and high-potential talent that strengthens the agency’s portfolio and competitive edge.
  • Oversee and lead all negotiations for brand deals, ensuring optimal value, alignment, and long-term partnership opportunities.


Brand Partnerships & Strategic Collaborations

  • Build and nurture strong relationships with key brands, partners, and stakeholders across luxury, fashion, and lifestyle industries.
  • Act as a senior point of contact for strategic partnerships, ensuring high-level client servicing and long-term collaboration success.
  • Drive the ideation and execution of innovative campaigns and partnerships that elevate both talent and brand positioning.
  • Collaborate cross-functionally with PR, marketing, events, and creative teams to deliver integrated and impactful campaigns.


Team Leadership & Development

  • Lead, structure, and scale a high-performing Talent & Partnerships team, ensuring clarity of roles, responsibilities, and performance expectations.
  • Provide strong leadership, mentorship, and direction to senior and mid-level team members, fostering a high-performance culture.
  • Establish processes, frameworks, and best practices to ensure operational excellence and scalability of the division.
  • Oversee team performance, ensuring alignment with business goals, client expectations, and agency standards.


KNOWLEDGE & EXPERIENCE

  • 10–12+ years of experience in talent management, influencer marketing, brand partnerships, or related fields, with significant leadership exposure.
  • Strong background in luxury, fashion, and lifestyle industries.
  • Proven track record in business development, revenue generation, and securing high-value partnerships.
  • Established network across brands, influencers, agencies, and key industry stakeholders.
  • Experience managing and scaling teams and business units.
  • Fluency in English (Arabic or French is a plus).


SKILLS & ABILITIES

  • Exceptional leadership and strategic planning abilities.
  • Strong business acumen and client relationship management.
  • Excellent negotiation, communication, and presentation skills.
  • Highly organized with the ability to manage multiple complex projects simultaneously.
  • Creative and analytical mindset with an eye for market opportunities.
  • Confident, adaptable, and proactive in driving new initiatives and growth.


If you’re interested, please share your resume at hr@maisonpyramide.com.
